article_title: Liquor Primary licences for outdoor event venues

briefs.title: Outdoor Event Venues Can Now Apply for a Permanent Liquor Primary Licence in BC
briefs.summary: BC's Liquor and Cannabis Regulation Branch now lets outdoor event venues apply for a permanent Liquor Primary licence instead of filing multiple Special Event Permits each year. This gives venues like music festivals and concert grounds a single, ongoing licence to serve liquor.
briefs.action_required: Apply for a permanent Liquor Primary licence via the BC liquor and cannabis licensing portal.
